_datasheet_peak_flops_tf_note: Wave 20 (feedback #2): vendor datasheet dense Tensor-Core peaks, for implied-MFU reporting ONLY. The roofline model must keep using peak_flops_tf. On NVIDIA parts peak_flops_tf is ~half of these (see _peak_flops_tf_convention); on TPU/Trainium the two coincide.

calibration.calibration_source: v1-validation Phase 0 — Llama-3-8B v5p MaxText anchor (was 0.35; MaxText reports ~50% MFU). v1 demo audit (June 2026) added efficiency_multipliers so reported MFU lands in the published Pallas/MaxText 45-55% band instead of the raw-roofline 30-35%.

notes.fused_efficiency_source: Splash Attention on v5p, systolic 128x128 achieves high matmul utilization but softmax reduction costs ~5-10%
notes.hbm_bw_source: Google TPU v5p specs, 2.77 TB/s HBM3, 95 GB per chip
notes.topology_note: 3D torus ICI, same fabric for intra- and inter-host
notes.nvlink_domain_size_note: v5p uses 16 chips per single torus axis; cross-axis incurs a ~2.5x penalty in _moe_alltoall_cost.
